eas_text: A civil authority has issued A CHILD ABDUCTION EMERGENCY for the following counties or areas: Calaveras; Fresno; Stanislaus; Mariposa; Tulare; Tuolumne, CA; at 10:45 AM on SEP 21, 2019 Effective until 11:45 AM. Message from WSLF/CAP.
extra_text:
AN AMBER ALERT IS BEING ISSUED BY THE CALIFORNIA HIGHWAY PATROL ON BEHALF OF THE MERCED COUNTY SHERIFFS DEPARTMENT.

ON SEPTEMBER 20, 2019, AT 7:00 PM, JOHN WEIR WAS ABDUCTED FROM MERCED, CALIFORNIA.  JOHN WEIR IS A 2 YEAR OLD WHITE MALE, WITH BLONDE HAIR AND BLUE EYES.  JOHN WEIR IS BELIEVED TO BE WEARING A BLUE T SHIRT AND TAN SHORTS.

THE SUSPECT, STEVEN WEIR, IS A 32 YEAR OLD WHITE MALE, STANDING 5 FEET 10 INCHES TALL, WEIGHING 300 POUNDS WITH BROWN HAIR AND BROWN EYES.   STEVEN WEIR IS BELIEVED TO BE WEARING A BLUE T SHIRT AND CARGO SHORTS.  THE SUSPECT SHOULD BE CONSIDERED ARMED AND DANGEROUS.

THE SUSPECT WAS LAST SEEN DRIVING A 2005 RED HYUNDAI ELANTRA, WITH CALIFORNIA LICENSE PLATE NUMBER 5SKT544.

IF SEEN CALL 9 1 1
